Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1D22 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Elite.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $4100 lda #$3e sta $01 jsr $4000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Elite.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added VIC init routine at $4000 which was snagged during the loading process from $75F7 to $76D0, minus the instructions between $75FC and $7610. Also inserted RLE packed colour RAM data to dump file at $4100 to restore before starting the game.
The loading screen is from the tape version
